/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/single_robo_custom_interface/libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/_cluster_points_s.c.o CMakeFiles/single_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/single_robo_custom_interface/msg/_com_with_id_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/asd/temp_git_repo/sakar_asignment/build/single_robo_custom_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libsingle_robo_custom_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
